accepted.text:
Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
Build your startup faster with free access to:
→ Up to $150k of Azure credits and discounts on 30+ tools your team needs to build, like GitHub, Microsoft 365, LinkedIn Premium, and more.
→ Credits toward Azure AI Studio—the most comprehensive set of AI models, including OpenAI GPT-3.5 Turbo, GPT-4, and Llama 2 by Meta.
→ 1:1 sessions with Microsoft experts to help you work through technical and business challenges.
Apply in minutes at https://aka.ms/apply-fh

accepted.text:
AI App Templates Workshop

These guides will help you get started using our AI App Templates along with the Azure OpenAI Proxy.

Here are the available templates with links to their guides:

Template | Description
OpenAI Chat App | A simple chat app that uses the OpenAI API to generate responses to user input.
RAG on PostgreSQL | A chat app that answers questions using a RAG flow with OpenAI and a PostgreSQL database.
RAG with Azure AI Search | A chat app that answers questions using a RAG flow with OpenAI and Azure AI Search.

We recommend going through each template in the order listed, as they build in complexity.

Workshop instructions: https://aka.ms/ai-workshop

plz tell me about the best shoes for hiking now

For the best shoes for hiking, we have a few options available:

1. The Trail Xtreme Hiking Shoes by Raptor Elite are a great choice. These shoes are built to endure any trail with their durable leather upper and rugged rubber sole. They offer excellent traction and protection. They come in a timeless brown color that adds a touch of style to your outdoor adventures. The price for these shoes is $135.99.

2. The TrailTracker Hiking Shoes by AirStrider are another excellent option. These shoes are lightweight and breathable, perfect for long hikes. They feature a rugged rubber sole for excellent traction and stability. The cool grey color with green accents adds a touch of style to your hiking ensemble. The price for these shoes is $89.99.

3. If you're looking for something with a steel-blue color, the Trailblaze Steel-Blue Hiking Shoes by WildRunner might be the right choice for you. These shoes are rugged and durable, with a waterproof membrane and a high-traction sole. They are made for superior grip on any terrain. The breathable upper keeps your feet cool and comfortable, and the reinforced toe cap adds extra protection. These shoes are priced at $129.99.

blocks.text: Azure AI Inference client library for Python
The client Library (in preview) does inference, including chat completions, for AI models deployed by Azure AI Studio and Azure Machine Learning Studio.
Use the model inference client library to:
• Authenticate against the service • Get information about the model • Do chat completions • Get text embeddings
With some minor adjustments, this client library can also be configured to do inference for Azure OpenAI endpoints.
See samples with azure_openai in their name, in the samples folder.
Project description • Release history • Download files • Verified details • Maintainers • microsoft
Product documentation | Samples | API reference documentation | Package (PyPI) | SDK source code

blocks.text: Manage your application environments. With this command group, you can create a new environment or get, set, and list your application environments.

• An application can have multiple environments (ex: dev, test, prod). • Each environment may have a different configuration (that is, connectivity information) for accessing Azure resources. • You can find all environment configuration under the .azure/<environment-name> folder. • The environment name is stored as the AZURE_ENV_NAME environment variable in the .azure/<environment-name>/.env file.
get-values • list • new • refresh • select • set
